data.name: NKS_STOCKS_COMMAND_STOCK_DESC
data.value: prati ghante stok jaanakaaree praapt karata hai

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_COMMAND_STOCK_ARGUMENT_COMPANY_DESC
data.value: laghu kampanee prateek

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIKEYPROMPT
data.value: apanee alphavantagai api kunjee darj karen

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIKEYNEEDED
data.value: krpaya apanee api kunjee pradaan karen.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIKEYISDEMO
data.value: pradarshan api kunjee ka upayog nahin kiya ja sakata.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIKEYINVALIDLENGTH
data.value: aapakee api kunjee 16 varnon kee honee chaahie.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIFAILED
data.value: stok deta praapt karate samay koee truti huee. atirikt jaanakaaree yahaan paee ja sakatee hai

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_OPENING
data.value: shuruaatee stok keemat

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_HIGH
data.value: uchch stok keemat

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_LOW
data.value: kam stok keemat

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_CLOSING
data.value: band stok keemat

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_VOLUME
data.value: stok volyoom

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_AVAPIKEYCONFIGURE
data.value: api kunjee aavashyak hai. setings se konfigar karen.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_NODATA
data.value: koee stok deta upalabdh nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_DESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako stok konfigar karane deta hai.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_APIKEY_NAME
data.value: api kunjee

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_APIKEY_DESC
data.value: alphavantagai stok api ke lie kunjee

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_COMPANY_NAME
data.value: kampanee kod

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_COMPANY_DESC
data.value: stok kampanee

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_STOCKS_TUI_CANTOBTAININFO
data.value: stok jaanakaaree nahin mil sakatee.
